item.title: Your AWS Certificate Makes You an AWS Salesman 摘要
item.description:
The author describes their initial confusion with AWS's complex interface, noting that finding basic services like web hosting was difficult. They discovered EC2 through the Free Tier but highlight AWS's opaque pricing that requires third-party calculators. The article argues AWS's complexity creates a moat, making developers believe it's the only option, while simpler, cheaper alternatives like DigitalOcean or Linode exist and often suffice for most needs. It concludes that web hosting is more accessible than AWS suggests, with many affordable VPS options available.
标签: AWS, cloud computing, web hosting, EC2, pricing, developer tools, VPS, DigitalOcean, Linode, Free Tier

item.title: Golden Tickets 摘要
item.description:
This article highlights a collection of vintage Milwaukee bus tickets from the late 1940s to early 1950s, featured on the Present & Correct blog. It emphasizes the graphic design elements, noting the variety in colors and typography that still maintain a cohesive brand identity. The author reflects on the care and passion evident in the weekly designs, transforming mundane bus passes into exuberant expressions of fun, with a particular mention of the integration of hand-lettering and typefaces.
标签: graphic design, vintage, typography, bus tickets, Milwaukee, 1940s, 1950s, branding, hand-lettering, design history

item.title: Viktor Orban Loses Election in Hungary, Concedes Defeat, Congratulates Opposition Winners 摘要
item.description:
Viktor Orban has conceded defeat in Hungary's election, congratulating the opposition in a speech where he stated, 'The responsibility and opportunity to govern were not given to us.' He vowed, 'We are not giving up. Never, never, never.' The results pave the way for Peter Magyar, a former Orban loyalist and opposition leader, to become prime minister. Orban acknowledged the election results as 'understandable and clear' and 'painful for us but unequivocal.' The article contrasts Orban's concession with Donald Trump's refusal to concede the 2020 U.S. election.
标签: politics, election, Hungary, Viktor Orban, concession, opposition, Peter Magyar, democracy, comparison, Donald Trump

item.title: Zed — A Font Superfamily 摘要
item.description:
Zed is a new font superfamily designed with accessibility as a core principle. Developed by Typotheque, it was tested with visually impaired patients at a French ophthalmology hospital and found to outperform Helvetica in reading speed across all groups. The font system includes two optical versions (Text and Display), four variable axes (width, weight, roundness, slant), support for 547 languages including endangered ones, Braille characters, and an icon font. Zed demonstrates that accessibility and aesthetic appeal can coexist, offering both practical functionality and beautiful design.
标签: typography, accessibility, font-design, user-experience, visual-design, inclusive-design, language-support, variable-fonts, design-systems, product-design
